title: The Charitable Endowments Act, 1890
full_text: The Charitable Endowments Act, 1890 पूर्त विन्‍यास अधिनियम, 1890 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189006 Act Number: 06 Enactment Date: 1890-03-17 Act Year: 1890 Short Title: The Charitable Endowments Act, 1890 Hindi Title: पूर्त विन्‍यास अधिनियम, 1890 Long Title: An Act to provide for the vesting and administration of property held in trust for charitable purposes. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 01-10-1890 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Charitable Endowments Act, 1890 Show all section Section 1. Title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Appointment and incorporation of treasurer of Charitable Endowments. Section 3A. Definition of “appropriate Government”, etc. Section 4. Orders vesting property in treasurer. Section 5. Schemes for administration of property vested in the treasurer. Section 6. Mode of applying for vesting orders and schemes. Section 7. [Omitted.]. Section 8. Bare trusteeship of treasurer. Section 9. Annual publication of list of properties vested in treasurer. Section 10. Limitation of functions and powers of treasurer. Section 11. Provision for continuance of office of treasurer in certain contingencies. Section 12. Transfer of property from one treasurer to another. Section 13. Power to make rules. Section 14. Indemnity to Government and treasurer. Section 15. Saving with respect to Advocate General and Official Trustee. Section 16. [Omitted.].
